SEARCH
Module geomed.app
Package geomed.app.controller

Class SidebarController

java.lang.Object
geomed.app.controller.SidebarController
public class SidebarController extends Object
Controller class for the JavaFX sidebar user interface.

This class handles UI interactions, manages map stats visualization, renders detailed descriptions for selected objects (Hospitals, Incidents, Delaunay Triangles), and triggers operations such as importing maps or generating simulation data.

It integrates Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) via SecurityContext to restrict UI buttons and sensitive data access (e.g., medical data or GDPR algorithmic explanation reports) based on whether the user is an Admin, Doctor, or Paramedic.

Version:
1.0

      public SidebarController()

  • Method Details

    • setMapManager

      public void setMapManager(MapManager mapManager)
      Injects the shared application MapManager dependency model data context. * @param mapManager the application data layer context instance

    • setMapController

      public void setMapController(MapController mapController)
      Injects the peer graphical rendering layout MapController. * @param mapController the drawing canvas controller instance

    • showHospitalDetails

      public void showHospitalDetails(Hospital hospital)
      Evaluates and formats data regarding a selected hospital, including geospatial analysis metrics such as its bounding Voronoi cell area and historical incident clustering density. * @param hospital the target Hospital instance to inspect, or null to wipe details

    • showIncidentDetails

      public void showIncidentDetails(VictimIncident incident)
      Builds and appends metadata outputs for a highlighted incident.

      Security Guardrails:

      • Patient medical logs are restricted solely to the UserRole.DOCTOR.
      • The GDPR Algorithmic Decision Report requires either an UserRole.ADMIN or UserRole.DOCTOR role.
      Parameters:
      incident - the target VictimIncident instance to inspect, or null to wipe details

    • showTriangleDetails

      public void showTriangleDetails(Triangle triangle)
      Extracts and displays information about a clicked Delaunay Triangle. Computes surface area, edge vector distances, and tracks traffic load disparities across the structural network.
      Parameters:
      triangle - the targeted mesh element layout node

    • clearSelectionDetails

      public void clearSelectionDetails()
      Resets the structural details description components to their default states.

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Automatically invoked by JavaFX loaders once FXML component mapping routines complete. Attaches structural listeners onto controls and runs startup validation routines.
